description: Arabic letter, probably official correspondence based on the handwriting and the wide space between the lines. This is the upper right corner. Mentions something to do with a caravan (nuzūl al-sayyāra). On recto (secondary use) there is some Aramaic literary text.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
